notes: Phase 1 (Naxxramas, The Obsidian Sanctum & The Eye of Eternity) Best in Slot from Wowhead's WotLK Classic guide (wowhead.com/wotlk/guide/classes/rogue/assassination/...-bis-gear-pve-phase-1) — used because Icy Veins has no Phase 1 table for this class. Sources kept as written by the guide (they mix boss drops, emblem purchases and crafted items; wording varies per guide author). The source lists one ranked one-hand weapon list; top pick stored as Main Hand, remaining ranked options as Off-Hand (site convention). Enchants and gems reused from the wotlk/p4 profile for this spec (same stat priorities; some gems are later-phase cuts — use the equivalent lower-tier cut in Phase 1).

enchants.source: Knights of the Ebon Blade — Revered

enchants.source: Sons of Hodir — Exalted (Master's Inscription of the Axe for scribes)

enchants.name: Enchant Cloak — Major Agility
enchants.source: Enchanting (Swordguard Embroidery for tailors; Flexweave Underlay for engineers)

enchants.name: Enchant Bracers — Greater Assault
enchants.source: Enchanting (Fur Lining — Attack Power for leatherworkers)

enchants.name: Icescale Leg Armor
enchants.source: Leatherworking (crafted, usable by all; cheaper Nerubian Leg Armor alternative)

enchants.name: Enchant Weapon — Berserking
enchants.source: Enchanting (Enchant Weapon — Mongoose as a cheaper alternative)

gems.name: Relentless Earthsiege Diamond (+37 crit, +3% crit damage) — or Thundering Skyflare Diamond
Delicate Cardinal Ruby (+23 Agi) — or Precise Cardinal Ruby (+16 hit / +23 Agi)
Glinting Ametrine (+16 hit / +23 Agi) — or Rigid King's Amber / Accurate Ametrine / Pristine Ametrine for socket bonus
Nightmare Tear (meta activator) — or Enchanted Tear / Shifting Dreadstone
